---
name: Maintenance Report
about: Report maintenance tasks and housekeeping activities
title: "[MAINTENANCE] "
labels: ["maintenance"]
assignees: ''
---

## 🔧 Maintenance Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task or housekeeping activity.

## 🎯 Purpose
Why is this maintenance necessary? What does it aim to improve?

## 📋 Tasks to Complete
- [ ] Task 1
- [ ] Task 2
- [ ] Task 3

## 🔄 Impact Assessment
What impact will this maintenance have on:
- [ ] Application functionality
- [ ] User experience
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Security

## ⚠️ Risks and Considerations
List any potential risks or considerations during this maintenance.

## 📅 Timeline
Expected completion date and any scheduling considerations.

## 📊 Success Criteria
How will we know this maintenance was successful?

## 🔗 Related Issues
List any related issues, pull requests, or documentation.
